tasks.subject: Task 1: Add backend interface + daemonBackend; refactor commands.go
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Introduce a `backend` interface in `cmd/breezy/backend.go`. Add `daemonBackend` that wraps today's HTTP plumbing per verb. Refactor every `cmdXxx` in `commands.go` to call `b.Foo(...)` instead of `httpJSON(...)`. Update `renderStatus` to take `breezy.Status` (drop the local `snapshotResp`). No user-visible change.

**Files:** Create `cmd/breezy/backend.go`. Modify `cmd/breezy/commands.go`, `cmd/breezy/main.go`, `cmd/breezy/render.go`. Tests should pass without modification.

**Verify:** `just check-all` exits 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezy/backend.go", "cmd/breezy/commands.go", "cmd/breezy/main.go", "cmd/breezy/render.go"], "verifyCommand": "just check-all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["backend interface declared with all verbs", "daemonBackend implements backend with same HTTP behavior", "every cmdXxx uses backend method", "renderStatus takes breezy.Status, snapshotResp removed", "fetchParamHex moved to daemonBackend.GetParam", "all existing tests pass without modification"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add directBackend (UDP via pkg/breezy/ops) + dual-backend tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append `directBackend` to `backend.go`. It opens `*breezy.Client` per device on first call (cached, mutex-guarded), calls `pkg/breezy/ops` for each verb, closes everything on `Close()`. Add `runStandalone` test helper and four parallel CLI tests using `pkg/breezy/fakedevice`.

**Files:** Modify `cmd/breezy/backend.go` (append directBackend). Modify `cmd/breezy/main_test.go` (runStandalone helper + tests). Possibly add `testBackend` package-level variable to `cmd/breezy/main.go` as a test seam.

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezy -run Standalone -v` → PASS for ≥4 tests; `just check-all` → exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezy/backend.go", "cmd/breezy/main.go", "cmd/breezy/main_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezy -run Standalone -v && just check-all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["directBackend lazy-opens *breezy.Client per name", "Close() releases all cached clients", "every backend method routes to pkg/breezy/ops", "Devices returns config-only rows (no live data)", "runStandalone helper builds directBackend pointed at fakedevice", "≥4 standalone tests pass: Power, SpeedPreset, Status, Faults"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: resolveBackend; remove defaultDaemonURL; standalone-aware ls/daemon-url
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace `resolveDaemonURL` with `resolveBackend` (rule: --daemon flag → daemonBackend; cfg.Daemon.Listen set → daemonBackend; else → directBackend). Remove `defaultDaemonURL` constant. Update `daemon-url` global to print `(standalone — no daemon)` when applicable. `cmdLs` keeps working in both modes (existing renderLs handles empty live fields).

**Files:** Modify `cmd/breezy/main.go`, `cmd/breezy/main_test.go`.

**Verify:** `just check-all` exits 0; `breezy daemon-url` against an empty config (no `[daemon]`) prints `(standalone — no daemon)`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezy/main.go", "cmd/breezy/main_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "just check-all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["defaultDaemonURL constant removed", "resolveBackend implements the three-rule precedence", "no fallback to 127.0.0.1:9876 — opting in to daemon mode means owning reachability", "daemon-url prints (standalone — no daemon) for directBackend", "TestDaemonURL with --daemon override still passes", "any test asserting on the old default URL is updated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: First-run config flip + README + CLAUDE.md + CHANGELOG
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Comment out `[daemon]` in `internal/config.WriteDefault`'s template so new users land in standalone. Update `TestWriteDefault_FreshTempDir` to assert on the commented form. Document standalone mode in README, CLAUDE.md, and CHANGELOG including the multi-CLI concurrency caveat.

**Files:** Modify `internal/config/config.go`, `internal/config/config_test.go`, `README.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`.

**Verify:** `just check-all` exits 0. Manual smoke: `HOME=$(mktemp -d) ./breezy daemon-url` prints `(standalone — no daemon)`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/config/config.go", "internal/config/config_test.go", "README.md", "CLAUDE.md", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "just check-all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["defaultConfigTemplate has [daemon] block commented out", "preamble comment explains how to enable daemon mode", "TestWriteDefault_FreshTempDir asserts on commented form", "README has standalone mode paragraph + concurrency caveat", "CLAUDE.md mentions standalone is the new default", "CHANGELOG [Unreleased] has Added + Breaking entries"]}
```
